title: rubus × pustulosus
intro: Rubus × pustulosus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Rubus × pustulosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Rubus × pustulosus include teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
